prompt:
You are Worker p1d-survey-schema. Ownership: prisma/schema.prisma and new prisma/migrations/*nasabah_survey*. Task: add minimal additive schema for nasabah survey notes timeline with relations to Nasabah, Company, optional User actor; include tenant-aware indexes and safe defaults. Generate migration SQL. Do not edit app code. Run prisma generate if needed and commit. You are not alone in codebase; do not revert others' edits.

MANDATORY COMMIT CADENCE: Commit early and often. Create a commit after each meaningful subtask (target every 10-20 minutes or each completed scope slice). Use clear commit messages with prefixes like feat/fix/test/docs/chore. Before finishing, ensure all completed work is committed. If quota/session ends unexpectedly, your latest commit must preserve progress.

You are Worker p1d-survey-actions-api. Ownership: src/actions/nasabah-survey.ts (new), src/app/api/nasabah/[id]/survey/route.ts (new). Task: implement list/create survey note API scoped by companyId and role guard; validation non-empty note and sensible max length; stable JSON responses. If schema model names differ, adapt cleanly. Add concise error handling. Run lint/build targeted checks and commit. You are not alone in codebase; do not revert unrelated files.

Task: add survey timeline UI on detail page and quick add survey note form on edit page integrated with /api/nasabah/[id]/survey. Keep hydration-safe for Next.js 16, avoid non-deterministic render, include loading/error states. Run build checks and commit. You are not alone in codebase; do not revert unrelated files.
